summary: Goal 3 Convergence Bugfix Testing Complete. All 12 backend tests passed. Both bugs fixed: (1) Capped papers now excluded from Goal 3 cross-match requirements, (2) Progress endpoint now correctly filters by primary_category and excludes experiment matches.

minor.issue: Tournament stats.goals_met not synced with progress endpoint goals_met for cs.DC and econ.GN
minor.note: Tournament document shows goals_met=False while progress shows True - may be stale cache

backend: cs.RO Goal 3 label shows 'Top-7 cross-matches (3 capped)'
cs.RO Goal 3 total=21 (less than 45, capped papers excluded correctly)
cs.RO Goal 3 done=10 out of 21 (non-capped top-K cross-matches)
Match counts are category-specific (primary_category filter working)
cs.RO tournament is paused as expected
Goal 3 math verified: C(7,2)=21 total pairs for top-7 non-capped papers

seed_data_creation: None - tested with existing production data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 18 verified the Goal 3 convergence bugfix. Key findings: (1) cs.RO shows 'Top-7 cross-matches (3 capped)' with 10/21 done - 3 papers are at max_matches (150+) and excluded from Goal 3, (2) Goal 3 total correctly reduced to C(7,2)=21 from C(10,2)=45, (3) Progress endpoint now filters matches by primary_category and excludes experiment/prediction matches, (4) Other categories (cs.DC, econ.GN, physics.comp-ph, q-bio.BM) all have goals_met=True with full 45/45 cross-matches, (5) cs.RO tournament is paused. Minor note: Tournament document stats.goals_met may be stale (shows False for cs.DC while progress shows True).

bugs_fixed: Capped papers now excluded from Goal 3 requirements (they've played max_matches)
Progress endpoint counts only standard tournament matches (not experiment/prediction)
